pairs.reason: high: A muzzle turns right; B muzzle and whiskers point left
high: opposed head profiles clearly point left and right
high: A nose projects left; B nose projects right
high: head and eye orientation oppose clearly
high: A faces left while B faces right
high: A muzzle points left; B muzzle points right
high: downturned heads still show opposed right and left muzzles
high: A lowers its face; B lifts its chin
high: A looks above level; B dips its head and gaze
high: A chin is raised; B muzzle slopes downward
medium: A is slightly elevated; B is slightly lowered
high: A looks upward; B looks sharply downward
medium: A tilts upward; B slopes down-left
medium: A holds the muzzle higher; B carries it lower
